## Impact

- [ ] Low (cosmetic or minor functional issue)
- [ ] Medium (affects specific use case)
- [ ] High (breaks core functionality)
- [ ] Critical (data loss or security issue)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the issue tracker for similar issues
- [ ] I have verified this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided enough information to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have included relevant logs or error messages
- [ ] I am willing to help fix this issue
